reference.description: Old-good search UX reference before the late-April frontend runtime performance refactors.

0 : Math\.max\(0, navTranslateY\))(?=[\s\S]*APP_ROUTE_NAV_SILHOUETTE_SHEET_EXCLUSION_MODE_VALUE)(?=[\s\S]*isPersistentNavBodyExclusionMode[\s\S]*dockedPersistentPoll[\s\S]*staticPersistent)(?=[\s\S]*shouldEnableSheetMaskForNavSilhouette[\s\S]*isPersistentNavBodyExclusionMode\(modeValue\)[\s\S]*Math\.max\(0, navBarHeight - Math\.max\(0, navTranslateY\)\) > 0\.25)(?=[\s\S]*resolveNativeSheetMaskBoundaryTranslateY[\s\S]*return Math\.max\(0, navTranslateY\))(?=[\s\S]*routeHostVisualRuntimeAuthority\.subscribe)(?=[\s\S]*runtime == null[\s\S]*\? null[\s\S]*exclusionModeValue:\s*runtime\.navSilhouetteSheetExclusionModeValue[\s\S]*navBarHeight:\s*runtime\.navBarHeight[\s\S]*navBarTop:\s*runtime\.navBarTop[\s\S]*bottomNavHiddenTranslateY:\s*runtime\.bottomNavHiddenTranslateY[\s\S]*navTranslateY:\s*runtime\.navTranslateY)(?=[\s\S]*sheetMaskRuntime == null[\s\S]*return null)(?=[\s\S]*useAnimatedProps[\s\S]*const modeValue[\s\S]*const boundaryTranslateY = resolveNativeSheetMaskBoundaryTranslateY[\s\S]*navTranslateY: boundaryTranslateY[\s\S]*maskEnabled: shouldMaskSheet[\s\S]*navBodyBoundaryTranslateY: boundaryTranslateY)(?=[\s\S]*<AnimatedSearchRouteSheetNavExclusionMaskNativeView[\s\S]*pointerEvents="box-none"[\s\S]*animatedProps=\{nativeMaskAnimatedProps as never\}[\s\S]*navBodyBoundaryTranslateY=\{initialBoundaryTranslateY\}[\s\S]*navBodyBoundaryVisibleY=\{sheetMaskRuntime\.navBarTop\}[\s\S]*navBodyBoundaryHiddenY=\{[\s\S]*sheetMaskRuntime\.navBarTop \+ Math\.max\(0, sheetMaskRuntime\.bottomNavHiddenTranslateY\)[\s\S]*\}[\s\S]*maskOriginY=\{0\}[\s\S]*style=\{\[styles\.sheetMask, \{ width: viewportWidth, height: viewportHeight \}\]\}[\s\S]*>\s*\{children\}\s*</AnimatedSearchRouteSheetNavExclusionMaskNativeView>)[\s\S]*$

sourceChecks.pattern: ^(?![\s\S]*rawRevealRect)(?![\s\S]*revealRect)(?![\s\S]*roundedRect:\s*navBodyRect)(?![\s\S]*roundedRect:\s*visibleRect)(?![\s\S]*maskPath\.append\(navCutoutPath\))(?![\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryY)(?![\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryProgress)(?![\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryIsHiding)(?![\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryAnimationDurationMs)(?![\s\S]*boundaryDeltaY\(forProgress)(?![\s\S]*translated_static_path_shared_progress)(?![\s\S]*CADisplayLink)(?![\s\S]*CAKeyframeAnimation)(?![\s\S]*makeBoundaryPathAnimation)(?![\s\S]*makeBoundaryTransformAnimation)(?=[\s\S]*makeSearchRouteNavSilhouetteMaterialPath)(?=[\s\S]*let materialPath = UIBezierPath\(rect: materialRect\))(?=[\s\S]*makeSearchRouteNavCutoutGeometry)(?=[\s\S]*roundedRect: cutoutGeometry\.rect[\s\S]*cornerRadius: cutoutGeometry\.radius)(?=[\s\S]*effectView\.layer\.mask = effectMaskLayer)(?=[\s\S]*tintView\.layer\.mask = tintMaskLayer)(?=[\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryVisibleY)(?=[\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryHiddenY)(?=[\s\S]*@objc var navBodyBoundaryTranslateY)(?=[\s\S]*@objc var onMaskPerfEvent)(?=[\s\S]*ensureTranslatedMaskPath)(?=[\s\S]*let maskLayerFrame = fullRect\.insetBy\(dx: 0, dy: -overscanY\))(?=[\s\S]*let localVisibleBoundaryY = visibleBoundaryY - maskOriginY - maskLayerFrame\.minY)(?=[\s\S]*resolvedBoundaryTranslateY\(\))(?=[\s\S]*CATransform3DMakeTranslation\(0, targetDeltaY, 0\))(?=[\s\S]*CATransform3DMakeTranslation\(0, toDeltaY, 0\))(?=[\s\S]*translated_static_path_shared_nav_translate_y)(?=[\s\S]*native_sheet_mask_transition_setup)(?![\s\S]*activeBoundaryAnimationTargetProgress)(?![\s\S]*CABasicAnimation\(keyPath: "transform"\))(?![\s\S]*boundaryAnimationTargetProgress)(?=[\s\S]*private func makeSheetExclusionMaskPath)(?=[\s\S]*let navBodyRect = CGRect)(?=[\s\S]*maskPath\.append\(UIBezierPath\(rect: navBodyRect\)\))[\s\S]*$
